rule.description: Vipnet [$vipnet.rule.name]: outbound connection from $(srcip):$(srcport) to $(dstip):$(dstport) via $(vipnet.deviceOutboundInterface).
Vipnet [$vipnet.rule.name]: outbound connection from $(srcip):$(srcport) to $(dstip):$(dstport) via $(vipnet.deviceOutboundInterface).
Vipnet [$vipnet.rule.name]: inbound connection from $(srcip):$(srcport) to $(dstip):$(dstport) via $(vipnet.deviceInboundInterface).
